name: 双持贝瑞塔 | 街头抢匪
nameZh: 双持贝瑞塔 | 街头抢匪
descriptionEn: Firing two large-mag Berettas at once will lower accuracy and increase load times. On the bright side, you'll get to fire two large-mag Berettas at once. Its base has been painted with a beige anodized map pattern. It looks like someone has drawn on top of the map since it was first applied. Planning is one thing, executing is another
descriptionZh: 两把具有大弹匣的贝瑞塔同时开火会降低精准度，并增加换弹时间。不过你得往好处想，这不，别人只有一把枪，而你可以同时用两把贝瑞塔射个痛快。 枪身饰有米色电镀地图花纹，宛如手工绘制一般。 计划是计划，执行是执行。
